fs.state_dir.perms_world_writable.why: Other users or processes can modify the full OpenClaw state directory.

fs.config.perms_writable.why: Other users can change auth, tool policy, or routing config.

fs.config.perms_world_readable.why: The config may leak tokens or other sensitive settings.
fs.config.perms_world_readable.primary_fix: filesystem perms on the active config file

gateway.bind_no_auth.why: The Gateway is remotely reachable without shared-secret auth.

gateway.loopback_no_auth.why: A reverse-proxied loopback listener may become effectively unauthenticated.

gateway.http.no_auth.why: HTTP API endpoints are reachable while `auth.mode="none"`.

gateway.tools_invoke_http.dangerous_allo.why: Dangerous tools are reachable through HTTP API paths.

gateway.nodes.allow_commands_dangerous.why: High-impact node commands are reachable remotely.

gateway.tailscale_funnel.why: Tailscale Funnel makes the Gateway publicly reachable.

gateway.control_ui.allowed_origins_requi.why: A non-loopback Control UI is missing an explicit browser-origin allowlist.

gateway.control_ui.host_header_origin_fa.why: Host-header origin fallback weakens DNS rebinding protections.

gateway.control_ui.insecure_auth.why: Control UI insecure-auth compatibility mode is enabled.

gateway.real_ip_fallback_enabled.why: Trusting X-Real-IP can enable source-IP spoofing via proxy misconfiguration.

discovery.mdns_full_mode.why: mDNS full mode advertises extra metadata on the local network.

config.insecure_or_dangerous_flags.why: One or more insecure or dangerous flags are enabled.

hooks.token_too_short.why: The hook ingress token is easier to brute-force.

hooks.request_session_key_enabled.why: External callers can choose session keys, creating persistence or collision risk.

hooks.request_session_key_prefixes_missi.why: There is no bound on externally supplied session-key shapes.

logging.redact_off.why: Sensitive values can leak into logs and status output.

sandbox.docker_config_mode_off.why: Docker sandbox config is present but sandboxing is inactive.

sandbox.dangerous_network_mode.why: The Docker sandbox uses host or namespace-join networking.

tools.exec.host_sandbox_no_sandbox_defau.why: Default `exec host=sandbox` resolves to host exec when sandboxing is off.

tools.exec.host_sandbox_no_sandbox_agent.why: Per-agent `exec host=sandbox` resolves to host exec when sandboxing is off.

tools.exec.safe_bins_interpreter_unprofi.why: Interpreter/runtime bins are allowed without explicit safe profiles.

skills.workspace.symlink_escape.why: A skill path in the workspace resolves outside the workspace root.

security.exposure.open_groups_with_eleva.why: Open groups plus elevated tools create a high-impact prompt-injection path.

security.exposure.open_groups_with_runti.why: Open groups can reach command or file tools without sandbox/workspace guards.

security.trust_model.multi_user_heuristi.why: The config looks multi-user without matching isolation and tool hardening.

tools.profile_minimal_overridden.why: Per-agent overrides bypass a minimal global profile.

plugins.tools_reachable_permissive_polic.why: Extension tools are reachable in permissive contexts.

models.small_params.why: Small or weak models plus tool access increase prompt-injection risk.
